messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0077",
  "title": "在用户产生疲劳之前完成内容更新",
  "page_index": 45,
  "page_range": "45"
}

Section text:
在用户产生疲劳之前
完成内容更新
●创意相关性往往在数天内快速衰减。
●主动规划更新节奏，在注意力流失之前完成
内容更新，确保在整个增长循环中保持连贯
一致的叙事体验。
Aarki 创意智能数据显示：若不进行刷新， CTR在4 
次曝光后可能下降约 45%；而结构化刷新周期可将表
现稳定性提升约 30%1。

message.content:
This section provides retrieval-ready information to answer questions about:
• **Topics:** Creative fatigue mitigation, content update scheduling, ad performance optimization, and narrative consistency in growth cycles.
• **Entities:** Aarki (Creative Intelligence platform), CTR (Click-Through Rate).
• **Timeframes/Exposure Counts:** Creative relevance decays within a few days; performance degradation occurs after 4 ad impressions.
• **Key Concepts:** Creative relevance decay, structured refresh cycles, user attention loss/fatigue.
• **Procedures/Recommendations:** Proactively plan update rhythms, execute content refreshes before attention declines, and maintain consistent storytelling throughout the growth cycle.
• **Claims:** Unrefreshed creatives rapidly lose relevance and engagement; structured update cycles prevent performance degradation and stabilize campaign results.
• **Metrics:** ~45% CTR drop after 4 exposures without refresh; ~30% improvement in performance stability with structured refresh cycles.
• **Evidence Types:** Quantitative platform analytics (Aarki Creative Intelligence data), cited with a reference marker.
• **Tables/Figures:** None included in this section.

   - *Procedures/Recommendations:* Proactively plan update rhythms, complete content updates before attention loss, maintain consistent narrative experience throughout the growth cycle.

response_text:
This section provides retrieval-ready information to answer questions about:
• **Topics:** Creative fatigue mitigation, content update scheduling, ad performance optimization, and narrative consistency in growth cycles.
• **Entities:** Aarki (Creative Intelligence platform), CTR (Click-Through Rate).
• **Timeframes/Exposure Counts:** Creative relevance decays within a few days; performance degradation occurs after 4 ad impressions.
• **Key Concepts:** Creative relevance decay, structured refresh cycles, user attention loss/fatigue.
• **Procedures/Recommendations:** Proactively plan update rhythms, execute content refreshes before attention declines, and maintain consistent storytelling throughout the growth cycle.
• **Claims:** Unrefreshed creatives rapidly lose relevance and engagement; structured update cycles prevent performance degradation and stabilize campaign results.
• **Metrics:** ~45% CTR drop after 4 exposures without refresh; ~30% improvement in performance stability with structured refresh cycles.
• **Evidence Types:** Quantitative platform analytics (Aarki Creative Intelligence data), cited with a reference marker.
• **Tables/Figures:** None included in this section.
